commit.subject: LU-18542 kernel: update RHEL 9.5 [5.14.0-503.16.1.el9_5]
commit.message:
LU-18542 kernel: update RHEL 9.5 [5.14.0-503.16.1.el9_5]

Update RHEL 9.5 kernel to 5.14.0-503.16.1.el9_5.

  clientdistro=el9.5 serverdistro=el9.4 testlist=sanity
